subject: [CDS] Update chart to use common mariadb-galera
commit_message:
[CDS] Update chart to use common mariadb-galera

Updates for CDS:
-Update CDS DB name to be (cdsdb) and user to be (cds) to avoid conflict
with SDNC DB in the common mariadb-galera.
-Add section under .Values.global for shared mariadb instance default
info with a condition to instantiate local instance.
-Add the related sections of Mariadb-init and Mariadb-galera under
.Values with removing unnecessary parameters
-Add condition under requirments.yaml to install local mariadb instance

Updates for CDS-Blueprints-processor:
-Update .Values to accommodate for the new changes in parent .Values
file.
-Update deployment to include the definitions of mariadb service and
port defined in (common/_mariadb.tpl)
-Update resources to reflect the new parameters and DB name.

Issue-ID: OOM-2732
Signed-off-by: Mahmoud Abdelhamid <mahmoud.abdelhamid@orange.com>
Change-Id: I9b05039ddd08e0dffcf94fe628c6f4fc5eb7593a
